decision_options.label: Approve for promotion preflight
decision_options.when_to_use: 稳定判断、概念定义、决策候选、来源和目标文件计划均已人工确认。
decision_options.effect: Marks the candidate approved-for-promotion; formal knowledge is still not written until promote --confirm.
decision_options.risk: Approval unlocks formal promotion, so weak claims should be revised first.
decision_options.command: tools/kb review-distillation _workbench/distillations/2026-06-13-ToolSearch与知识库主动被动更新机制-沉淀候选.md approve --note "沉淀内容和入库计划已人工确认"
decision_options.note_template: 沉淀内容、来源链和入库计划已人工确认，可进入 promote 前置状态。

decision_options.label: Request revision
decision_options.when_to_use: 结论表达、证据链、目标主题、冲突处理或待验证问题还需要打磨。
decision_options.effect: Keeps the candidate in pending-human-review and records a revision request.
decision_options.risk: Delays formalization, but protects the knowledge base from premature consensus.
decision_options.command: tools/kb review-distillation _workbench/distillations/2026-06-13-ToolSearch与知识库主动被动更新机制-沉淀候选.md needs-revision --note "需要补充或修订"
decision_options.note_template: 需要补充证据、收敛表达或调整入库计划。

decision_options.label: Reject candidate
decision_options.when_to_use: 该候选不应成为正式知识，或议题方向已被推翻。
decision_options.effect: Marks the candidate rejected/deprecated without writing formal knowledge.
decision_options.risk: Rejected candidate will no longer be the main promotion path.
decision_options.command: tools/kb review-distillation _workbench/distillations/2026-06-13-ToolSearch与知识库主动被动更新机制-沉淀候选.md reject --note "不进入正式知识库"
decision_options.note_template: 该候选不进入正式知识库。

guardrails: This guide is read-only and must not be treated as human approval.
Use preview commands before any review decision.
Only run review-source, review-distillation, approve-distillation, or promote --confirm after explicit human confirmation.
Prefer needs-revision when evidence, wording, target path, or scope is uncertain.
